nodes.name: daemon-state.json
nodes.summary: Claude Code daemon state tracking worker metrics including run counts, success/failure rates, average durations, and scheduled execution times for map, audit, optimize, consolidate, and test-gap workers.

nodes.name: harness-active-policy.json
nodes.summary: Active Claude Code harness policy configuration defining behavioral parameters and constraints for the development environment.

nodes.name: stats.json
nodes.summary: Neural network statistics and training metrics collected during Claude Code harness execution.

nodes.name: proven-config.json
nodes.summary: Proven configuration manifest for Ruflo framework with policy parameters, benchmark corpus, performance metrics, and multi-platform compatibility declaration.

nodes.name: settings.local.json
nodes.summary: Local Claude Code environment settings overriding project-wide configuration.

nodes.name: DefaultChartOfAccounts.json
nodes.summary: Seed data defining the default chart of accounts with Indian standard account groups and ledger structures for new Avelo companies.

nodes.name: knowledge-graph.json
nodes.summary: Generated knowledge graph containing all project nodes, edges, architectural layers, and guided learning tours representing the Avelo codebase structure and relationships.

nodes.name: daemon.pid
nodes.summary: Process identifier file tracking the running Claude Code daemon instance.

nodes.name: .proven-config-version
nodes.summary: Version marker for the proven configuration state.

nodes.name: Avelo.entitlements
nodes.summary: macOS app entitlements configuration declaring required system capabilities for Avelo including file access and security sandbox settings.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore rules for the Understand-Anything knowledge-graph scanner specifying files and directories to exclude from analysis.

nodes.name: build_graph.mjs
nodes.summary: Knowledge-graph builder utility that parses Swift symbol definitions, constructs file and class nodes, derives architectural layers, and generates guided learning tours for the Avelo codebase.

nodes.name: prefixFor
nodes.summary: Maps file category to node type prefix (document, config, pipeline, service, table, schema, or file).

nodes.name: complexity
nodes.summary: Classifies file complexity as simple, moderate, or complex based on line count thresholds.

nodes.name: tags
nodes.summary: Generates semantic tags for files based on category and path patterns, limiting to 5 tags per file.

nodes.name: summary
nodes.summary: Generates descriptive summaries for files based on category and path patterns with Avelo-specific conventions.

nodes.name: addEdge
nodes.summary: Adds a directed graph edge with source, target, type, weight, and optional label, skipping self-references.

nodes.name: layerFor
nodes.summary: Maps file paths to architectural layer assignments for application shell, features, services, persistence, models, tests, and documentation.

nodes.name: generate-batch-9.js
nodes.summary: Batch 9 semantic analysis generator providing detailed class and function summaries for core database, service, and cache modules used in knowledge-graph construction.

nodes.name: validate.cjs
nodes.summary: Knowledge-graph validator that checks node integrity, edge connectivity, layer assignments, and tour references, reporting structural issues and warnings.

nodes.name: orchestrator.py
nodes.summary: Autonomous development pipeline orchestrator triggering FLOW and TEST agents via local LLM, executing builds and tests, logging results, and managing errors.

nodes.name: ask_local_llm
nodes.summary: Sends a prompt to a local Ollama LLM instance and returns the response, with error handling for connection failures.

nodes.name: run_command
nodes.summary: Executes a shell command and returns the exit code and combined stdout/stderr output.

nodes.name: read_file
nodes.summary: Reads and returns the complete contents of a file as a string.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Orchestrates autonomous pipeline execution including FLOW agent prompt, test execution, logging, and error handling.

nodes.name: Package.swift
nodes.summary: Swift Package Manager manifest declaring Avelo executable, test targets, SQLCipher C module dependency, and resource includes for the macOS application.

nodes.name: BenchmarkSupport.swift
nodes.summary: Benchmark utilities providing environment-driven configuration, nanosecond-precision timing, resident memory measurement, and thermal-state monitoring for performance regression tests.

nodes.name: BenchmarkConfig
nodes.summary: Enumeration of environment-driven benchmark configuration properties including enabled flags, voucher counts, output directories, and scorecard mode.

nodes.name: BenchmarkResult
nodes.summary: Sendable struct capturing benchmark results including name, elapsed time, resident memory, and thermal state.

nodes.name: BenchmarkClock
nodes.summary: Enumeration providing synchronous and async benchmark measurement with nanosecond precision, resident-byte tracking via Darwin mach APIs, and result emission.

nodes.name: measure
nodes.summary: Measures synchronous block execution with nanosecond precision and resident memory, returning a BenchmarkResult.

nodes.name: measureAsync
nodes.summary: Measures asynchronous block execution with nanosecond precision and resident memory, returning a BenchmarkResult.

nodes.name: currentResidentBytes
nodes.summary: Queries Darwin mach APIs to obtain the current process resident memory in bytes.

nodes.name: emit
nodes.summary: Prints a formatted benchmark result with timing, resident memory, and thermal state.

nodes.name: benchmark_diff.py
nodes.summary: Benchmark comparison utility that reads before/after JSON results and reports duration delta percentages for each metric, identifying performance regressions.

nodes.name: avelo_companies
nodes.summary: Core companies table storing organization identity, address, tax identifiers (GSTIN, PAN), base currency, and inventory configuration with constraints on currency and field lengths.

nodes.name: avelo_financial_years
nodes.summary: Financial years scoped to companies with start/end dates, lock/close flags, and non-overlapping constraint enforced via trigger.

nodes.name: avelo_account_groups
nodes.summary: Hierarchical account grouping with nature classification (assets/liabilities/income/expense), parent references, and company isolation.

nodes.name: avelo_accounts
nodes.summary: Ledger accounts with opening balances, debit/credit side, bank-account flag, and GSTIN for GST tracking.

nodes.name: bug_report.md
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for reporting Avelo defects with sections for summary, reproduction steps, expected results, and environment details.

nodes.name: feature_request.md
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for requesting new Avelo features with sections for description, use case, and acceptance criteria.

nodes.name: PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
nodes.summary: GitHub pull request template establishing conventions for change descriptions, related issues, and release-readiness checklist.

nodes.name: Tally_Master_Study_Guide.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference guide documenting Tally accounting software master data concepts, field definitions, and conventions for use in Avelo parity and feature mapping.
